title: Axolotl Girl
description: Replaces vanilla dolphins with axolotl girls
body:
|**Axolotl Girl / Need [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home), (or mods like etf, emf, etc. that will make this work on Fabric)** |:---:| ______________________________________________________________________________ |**A resource pack that turns all dolphins into axolotl girls, meaning they all become anthropomorphic female axolotls who, just like their predecessors, will live in the seas.** |:---:| ``` Works for 1.19.2+ and higher ```
______________________________________________________________________________ |**In the game, its name was also changed from "Dolphin" to "Axolotl Girl". In addition, this resource pack is planned to receive updates in the future if we see that you like it.** |:---:|
